labor_share.basis: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 541410 ($4,053,951,989) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 541410 ($18,324,956,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.basis: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $342,107 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541410); class <5: 13,213 firms, avg revenue/firm $590,121 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $92,354 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 1,938 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,036,537 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $318,718 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 673 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,873,851 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $606,258 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 275 firms, avg revenue/firm $10,288,840 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,610,203 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 25 firms, avg revenue/firm $24,612,240 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,851,816 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 13 firms, avg revenue/firm $40,695,462 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $6,368,840 -> IN $1-10M band; n_band = 313
